title: Traders Shrine
description: A centralized Villager Trading Hub for your Trading Halls. Features Bulk Trading, Upgrades and more QoL.
body:
# Traders Shrine **The centralized Villager Trading Hub you never knew you ducking needed in your Trading Halls.** Tired of running between countless villagers to find that one trade? Or tired of Bulk trading? Place a Traders Shrine, and it automatically scans all nearby Villagers! Giving you access to every trade from a single, **clean interface**. --- ![statue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qnRPa7yN/images/beeec32dc103cbb5096b1c3499787336c8462564.png) --- ## ✨ Features
### 📦 Trading Modes
**Single Trade Mode** > Browse through individual villagers, see their professions and levels, then pick specific trades. Great for when you need something particular. **Bulk Trade Mode** > Every trade from every villager in one list, sorted by cost. Find the cheapest mending book across all your librarians instantly. Buy in quantities of 16, 32, 64, or MAX!
### 🔍 Villager Detection - Automatically detects all villagers within range - Supports custom-named villagers (nametags work!) - Dynamic range that can be upgraded up to **50 blocks**
### ⬆️ Deep/Grindy Upgrade System Each shrine has its own progression. Invest resources to unlock: | Upgrade | What it does | |---------|-------------| | **Single Trade** | More trades before cooldown (up to 32) | | **Bulk Trade** | More bulk purchases before cooldown (up to 5) | | **Range** | Larger detection radius (6→50 blocks) | | **Multiplier** | Bonus output on trades (up to 2x) |
📊 Single Trade Upgrade Costs | Level | Trades | Cost | |-------|--------|------| | 1 | 8 → 10 | 16 Iron Blocks | | 2 | 10 → 12 | 24 Iron Blocks + 8 Redstone Blocks | | 3 | 12 → 14 | 32 Iron Blocks + 16 Redstone Blocks | | 4 | 14 → 16 | 16 Gold Blocks + 16 Quartz Blocks | | 5 | 16 → 20 | 24 Gold Blocks + 12 Amethyst Blocks + 1 Diamond Block | | 6 | 20 → 24 | 32 Gold Blocks + 24 Amethyst Blocks + 1 Diamond Block | | 7 | 24 → 28 | 24 Quartz Blocks + 16 Crying Obsidian + 2 Diamond Blocks | | 8 | 28 → 32 | 8 Amethyst Blocks + 4 Diamond Blocks + 4 Echo Shards | | MAX | 32 | 2 Nether Stars + 6 Diamond Blocks |
📊 Bulk Trade Upgrade Costs | Level | Trades | Cooldown | Cost | |-------|--------|----------|------| | 1 | 1 → 2 | 300s → 240s | 24 Copper Blocks + 16 Iron Blocks | | 2 | 2 → 3 | 240s → 180s | 32 Copper Blocks + 24 Iron Blocks + 2 Diamond Blocks | | 3 | 3 → 4 | 180s → 120s | 24 Gold Blocks + 16 Redstone Blocks + 2 Diamond Blocks | | 4 | 4 → 5 | 120s → 60s | 32 Gold Blocks + 16 Amethyst Blocks + 6 Diamond Blocks | | MAX | 5 | 60s | 10 Diamond Blocks + 8 Echo Shards + 1 Nether Star |
📊 Range Upgrade Costs | Level | Range | Cost | |-------|-------|------| | 1 | 6 → 10 | 8 Copper Blocks | | 2 | 10 → 14 | 16 Copper Blocks | | 3 | 14 → 18 | 8 Iron Blocks | | 4 | 18 → 22 | 16 Iron Blocks + 1 Diamond Block | | 5 | 22 → 26 | 8 Gold Blocks + 1 Diamond Block | | 6 | 26 → 30 | 16 Gold Blocks + 2 Diamond Blocks | | 7 | 30 → 34 | 12 Quartz Blocks + 8 Crying Obsidian | | 8 | 34 → 38 | 24 Quartz Blocks + 16 Crying Obsidian + 2 Diamond Blocks | | 9 | 38 → 42 | 12 Amethyst Blocks + 12 Quartz Blocks + 4 Diamond Blocks | | 10 | 42 → 46 | 24 Amethyst Blocks + 6 Diamond Blocks | | MAX | 46 → 50 | 8 Diamond Blocks + 6 Echo Shards + 1 Nether Star |
📊 Multiplier Upgrade Costs > **Note:** Multiplier unlocks after reaching level 3 on Bulk Trade. | Level | Multiplier | Cost | |-------|------------|------| | 1 | 1.0 → 1.1 | 16 Iron Blocks | | 2 | 1.1 → 1.2 | 32 Iron Blocks | | 3 | 1.2 → 1.3 | 16 Gold Blocks | | 4 | 1.3 → 1.4 | 24 Gold Blocks + 2 Diamond Blocks | | 5 | 1.4 → 1.5 | 16 Quartz Blocks + 16 Amethyst Blocks + 4 Diamond Blocks | | 6 | 1.5 → 1.6 | 32 Quartz Blocks + 32 Amethyst Blocks + 6 Diamond Blocks | | 7 | 1.6 → 1.7 | 8 Diamond Blocks + 4 Echo Shards | | 8 | 1.7 → 1.8 | 12 Diamond Blocks + 8 Echo Shards | | 9 | 1.8 → 1.9 | 16 Diamond Blocks + 12 Echo Shards | | MAX | 1.9 → 2.0 | 2 Nether Stars + 20 Diamond Blocks |
--- ## 🛡️ Multiplayer Ready - **Owner Protection**: Only the player who placed the shrine can access settings or destroy it - **Session Locking**: When someone's using a shrine, others can't interfere/open it - **Anti-Theft**: GUI items are protected — so, no stealing from the barrel --- ## 🛡️ QoL - **Nitwit converting**: Nitwits will get converted to normal Villagers after some time - **Villager Buffs**: Healing and Protection for your Villagers in case of accidents! --- ## 📋 How to 1. **Craft the Shrine** — Recipe below 2. **Place it** — Find a spot with vertical clearance (Shrines are 3 blocks tall) 3. **Bring Villagers** — Any villagers within range get detected automatically 4. **Right-click the Shrine** — Open the trading interface/shrine menu 5. **Trade & Upgrade** — Build up your shrine over time
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qnRPa7yN/images/4c2ee7eebe9b56ceb9e458e8b5c43251719938b1.png) --- ## ❓ FAQ **Can I pick up and move a shrine?** > Yes! Break it as the owner, and you'll get the shrine item back with all upgrades preserved. **Does it work with cured villagers?** > Absolutely. Any villager with trades works. (Not Wandering Traders) **What if two players try to use the same shrine?** > The second player gets blocked until the first one closes the menu. **Can I have multiple shrines?** > Yes, each shrine is independent with its own upgrades and range. --- ### **Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/rXnr7XHRg8) server for Bug reports or feature suggestions :)**
